headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Marriott International (MAR) After Its Strong 1 Year Rally?
summary: Investors may be wondering whether Marriott International at around US$375.45 is still offering value after a strong run, or if the easy gains are behind it. The stock has posted returns of 2.4% over the last 7 days, 17.4% over 30 days, 19.8% year to date, and 71.8% over 1 year, with longer term returns of 123.7% over 3 years and 160.5% over 5 years. Recent performance has kept Marriott in focus for investors looking at large, established hospitality names as part of a long term portfolio...
